## Summary

Describe the user-visible or architecture-visible change.

## PR Readiness

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/pr_readiness.py check` locally, or I am relying on the equivalent checks from `python scripts/pr_readiness.py seal --commit`.
- [ ] This branch ends with the standalone PR-readiness attestation commit produced by `python scripts/pr_readiness.py seal --commit`.
- [ ] I listed any skipped coverage, optional backend gaps, or manual GUI checks below.

## Manual Checks Or Skipped Coverage

Document any manual validation, intentionally skipped checks, or follow-up risk.
